arts.ttl: Gary Neville suggests radical Premier League rule change that would impact Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs
arts.sum: In the group stages of the EFL Trophy, a competition that Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham U21s are involved in, if a game ends in a draw, a penalty shootout takes place with the winning team earning a bonus point. Former Premier League defender turned pundit Gary Neville has suggested a major shake-up of how points are awarded in the league, which would have a major impact at the end of the season.

The Blues were extremely close to finalising an agreement for the 25-year-old this summer, but the move failed to materialise due to several small issues and he joined Galatasaray on loan instead. How close were Chelsea to signing Victor Osimhen this summer?
